name: claude-for-codex
description: Call Claude Code from Codex. Two commands: /claude (read-only) and /claude-write (edit & verify).

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code from Codex (read or write)
interface.longDescription: Adds two slash commands: /claude asks Claude Code in read-only mode (second opinion, review, research); /claude-write lets Claude edit files and verify. Claude gets the full toolset; read-only is enforced by its system prompt.
